capture_method: OpenClaw browser Google Maps review panel after selecting Sort > Highest rating; visible written reviews captured from DOM text.

reviews.text_visible: Such a gem!!! This place has amazing drinks and service. The weekly martinis were amazing. The atmosphere is so fun — chill but still lively and fun! We were greeted so warmly and even offered birthday cake. Can’t wait to go again :)

Strawberry Moon is always a pleasure to visit. We’ve been coming here for around 4 years now, and it’s always an excellent vibe, with excellent service with excellent drinks, and we always have an excellent time. Truly a gem in Wauconda.
Highly recommend if you find yourself in the area. Laid back and great service. Especially tuesdays for the martini flight if you are indecisive like me! Thank you Tom for the hospitality.
Easily the best martinis in lake county! Had the caramel apple and spiced ginger pear martinis with the wine and cheese fondue. Everything was fantastic!
Excellent spot great service. Worth checking out if you have never been before. Cocktails are excellent.

I absolutely LOVE Strawberry Moon and make it a point to come on every time I'm in the area. The staff is so welcoming and incredibly knowledgeable. They can make you just about any drink you want- on or off the menu!
My wife and I decided to stop in and give this place a try. We are happy we did because the drinks were amazing. The strawberry moon martini was a hit, and the appetizers were delicious.
Our new favorite place! All around excellent experience. Food, drinks, service and atmosphere. Highly recommend.
This bar is ADORABLE!!! I can't wait to come back. Great vibe, great band, great martini's. All the martinis are phenomenal. I drive an hour just to come to this bar

I give Strawberry Moon in Wauconda Illinois five stars! We really enjoyed the singing of John Ludy. He is really talented, and sings plenty of songs for everyone to get out on the Strawberry Moon dance floor and cut a rug.

Fantastic martini bar. The food was "to die for" delicious. The staff is phenomenal and personable. The drinks were also pretty tasty. I would highly recommend this location and will definitely return for more food and beverages.

I’ve been to Strawberry Moon 3 times now and I can confidently say that this place ALWAYS leaves me satisfied. The atmosphere and drinks are great. Awesome spot to hang out and enjoy a good time. Highly recommend.

Sweet small local spot. Knowledgeable & friendly bartenders. Music three nights a week, always good talent and variety. Two levels with a quiet upstairs with some good views. Go to the Moon, for a martini or two.
Cute little place, specializing in martinis and appetizers. Great bartender, very friendly and welcoming.
It's a small but mighty place. I've enjoyed the live music on Fridays. Also, they have custom craft cocktails that will blow you away. Yum!
Heather & Steve are must-see performers. Staff is knowledgeable. Drinks are reasonable.
Service is everything! Becky is one of a kind. From the moment we arrived, Becky provided impeccable service...service that many might say is long gone.
One of my favorite places to go in Wauconda! Wonderful people, great music & amazing martinis!
Nice place good drinks bartender Craig great customer service

Looking for a quaint place to enjoy a drink that feels like you've either gone backward or forward in time but you're not sure which? This is the place to go. You'll stay awhile because you'll feel like you're in a wonderful world.

Great martinis and service was awesome. We had the pretzel nuggets and it came with 4 different varieties of dipping sauces that were all great. The martinis were fresh and had a great variety of choices. Great for a ladies night out, a quick before dinner drink and a nice date night out. Will go back.

What's not to love.. Flavored martinis, live music 3 days a week, quality food options. Bigger than it looks but small enough for an intimate evening out. Owner, Tom, circulates visiting tables to ensure all expectations are met. It's worth the visit..
Very cute place with amazing food and delicious, curated cocktails. Highly recommend; feels like you're off the coast of the Mediterranean Sea, not Miami.
Craig is a phenomenal bartender!! So attentive & creates amazing drinks! Great atmosphere & super cozy. Can’t get enough. Will definitely be coming back
Truly a wonderful time was had. The Stormy Night Martini was amazing and Jim Perona was fabulous on the guitar! We are definitely going to be back!

Comfortable setting with great music to get together with friends and unwind at end of day. Don't see what you have a thirst for on the menu? Ask the bartender to whip something up to suit your taste. Owners are very friendly and give back.

Attended a small adult birthday party at Strawberry Moon and found a new favorite bar. Originally opened as a martini bar, it now serves a wide selection of adult beverages and has great noshes as well. Live music on the lower level was soft enough upstairs we could still have a conversation. I'll be back!!

This place is FANTASTIC!!! Amazing drinks and super talented acts. I'm coming here every time I visit my family. Drinks are a bit expensive but SO worth it. Tip the staff well they work their butts off with a smile and happy attitude.
Very cute cocktail bar
Went there on a Saturday night. Had live music (duo) but it was quiet enough we could still talk. Music was good, nice atmosphere, good martinis. Great evening.
